description_long: This is a medium-sized, worn cardboard box with partially open flaps, showing signs of use and handling. The box is constructed from corrugated cardboard, with visible creases, scuffs, and some areas of discoloration, suggesting it has been moved or stored in various environments. One side features a piece of tape, while another side has faint printed markings, including the code 'PK _ 489'. The flaps are irregularly opened, with some bent or slightly warped, indicating the box has been opened and closed multiple times. The surface texture is matte and rough, with visible fibers and patches where the outer layer has been abraded. The box appears empty, as the flaps are not bulging and the sides are slightly caved in.
description: A worn, medium-sized cardboard box with partially open, bent flaps and visible scuffs, tape, and printed markings. The surface is matte, rough, and shows signs of repeated use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open flaps, a printed code 'PK _ 489', and scuffed, slightly caved-in cardboard.
description_view_1: Side view with a large piece of tape on the left face and one flap sticking up more prominently than the others.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a large open flap extending outward and visible wear on the lower part of the box.
description_view_3: Rear view showing mostly closed flaps, heavy scuffing, and no visible tape or printed markings.
